summary: Tested Service Desk to Concierge sync fix. Backend tests (14/14) passed successfully. All 5 requested features verified working via API testing.

1_service_desk_reply_sync.details: POST /api/tickets/{ticket_id}/reply successfully adds reply and syncs to concierge_messages. Backend finds thread via metadata.user_id and metadata.thread_id.

2_member_notifications.details: GET /api/user/notifications?email=dipali@clubconcierge.in returns 20+ notifications including concierge_reply type. Notifications created when Service Desk replies.

3_concierge_conversation_loading.details: GET /api/os/concierge/home and /api/os/concierge/threads return recent_threads. Thread detail loads messages including service_desk sourced messages.

4_ai_reply_draft_generation.details: POST /api/tickets/ai/draft-reply works with professional, friendly, and empathetic (Mira tone) styles. Returns AI-generated draft based on ticket context and Pet Soul data.

5_html_stripping_in_messages.details:
stripHtml function in ConciergeThreadPanelV2.jsx strips HTML tags from service_desk sourced messages. Content displays cleanly without

, , tags.

critical_code_review_comments: Backend add_reply now correctly finds threads via metadata.user_id and metadata.thread_id (lines 2062-2064, 2119-2122 in ticket_routes.py)
Frontend ConciergeThreadPanelV2.jsx fetchThread now triggers when initialMessages.length === 0 (line 515)
stripHtml function properly handles HTML from Service Desk replies (lines 132-141)

success_rate.frontend: Visual verification passed - login, dashboard, admin portal all load correctly

seed_data_creation: Test replies added to ticket 48d4ac66-4a88-43f4-80b6-105013f6f0ed during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Service Desk to Concierge sync is working. Three bugs were fixed by main agent: 1) Backend now finds thread via metadata.user_id/thread_id, 2) Frontend fetches when initialMessages empty, 3) HTML stripped from Service Desk messages. All 5 features verified: reply sync, notifications, conversation loading, AI draft with styles, HTML stripping.
